subject: [acme-corp/app] New pull request #42
snippet: A new pull request has been opened by contributor123.
html:
contributor123 opened a new pull request in acme-corp/app:

Fix auth token refresh logic

This PR updates the token refresh flow to handle expired sessions gracefully and adds retry logic for transient failures.

  • Added exponential backoff
  • Fixed race condition in refresh handler
  • Updated unit tests

View pull request
